description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.23.6 fixes token account refresh for Cursor, Ollama, and other cookie-token providers so active token accounts refresh through web cookies instead of falling back to unsupported CLI mode.
